subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you following the conference! I'd be happy to get a formal meeting on the calendar to explore how Vendor Inc. and our team might work together.

For next week, I'm available:
- Tuesday afternoon (1-3 PM)
- Wednesday morning (10 AM-12 PM)
- Thursday afternoon (2-4 PM)

Would any of those work for a 30-minute call? Let me know your preference and I'll send over a calendar invite.

Regarding reaching out directly to our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'd suggest we start with our introductory call first. If our initial discussion shows strong alignment, I'm happy to coordinate a follow-up meeting with the right senior stakeholders through proper internal channels.

Excited to explore this further!

Best regards
